properties.query: INSERT INTO courses (title, description, price, createdAt, updatedAt, level, instructor_id, deleted) VALUES (?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ?, ?, 0)
SELECT id, title FROM courses WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.price, c.createdAt, c.updatedAt, c.level, c.instructor_id, i.name AS instructor_name, i.introduction AS instructor_introduction FROM courses c LEFT JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE c.id = ? AND c.deleted = 0
UPDATE courses SET title = ?, price = ?, level = ?, description = ?, instructor_id = ?, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE courses SET deleted = 1, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
INSERT INTO contents (title, content, createdAt, updatedAt, seq, course_id, content_type, deleted) VALUES (?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ?, ?, ?, 0)
SELECT id, title, content, createdAt, updatedAt, seq, course_id, content_type FROM contents WHERE course_id = ? AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY seq ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, title, content, createdAt, updatedAt, seq, course_id, content_type FROM contents WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET title = ?, content = ?, content_type = ?, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET deleted = 1, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET deleted = 1, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND deleted = 0
INSERT INTO instructors (name, introduction, deleted) VALUES (?, ?, 0)
SELECT id, name, introduction FROM instructors WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, introduction FROM instructors WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instructors WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE instructors SET name = ?, introduction = ? WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
UPDATE instructors SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0
